message:
refactor(agentmail): return structured ReleaseReservationsResult from ReleaseReservations API

The ReleaseReservations client method previously returned only an error, forcing
callers to estimate released count from input parameters. Now returns
(*ReleaseReservationsResult, error) with actual released count and timestamp
from the server.

API change:
- ReleaseReservations return type: error → (*ReleaseReservationsResult, error)
- ReservationTransferClient interface updated to match

Caller updates:
- reservation.go (ReleaseForBead, ReleaseByPaths): destructure result, return err
- unlock.go: use actual ReleasedAt timestamp and Released count from result;
  show "No active reservations to release" when count is 0 instead of always
  claiming success; show exact count with "Released N reservation(s)"
- transfer.go: update 3 call sites to handle (result, err) tuple
- file_reservation.go (releaseIdleReservations, releaseAllReservations): use
  actual Released count from result instead of estimating from input slice length

Tests:
- fakeTransferClient.ReleaseReservations updated to return result with count
- TestTransferReservationsReleaseFailure: releaseFn returns (nil, error)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
